description: The app itself is very nice and has a lot of fo features that can be utilized to develop any web-based application without any coding expertise.
author: Romaric S.
pros: It's an intelligent alternative for coders or noncoders looking for web app-building solutions with high budget and flexibility.BuildFire offers fascinating app-building solutions similar to bubble.io with a lot of cool and awesome features to develop business apps in almost any industry.This tool is ideal for building any type of web-based app no matter its complexity. It's easy to use and provides a nice development experience.
cons: It's certain that BuildFire is best for large businesses and enterprises with high budgets. It's a major reason why we had to deviate to a different provider

description: It was a great experience. I have used the "other guys" before and was not pleased with my final product. This is a solid platform that does not look like a cookie cutter app, which is what the competition offers.
author: Chris S.
pros: The ease and quick ability to design, build and publish an app is second to none. They have all of the needed tools, support and UX to build not just any old app, but a great looking app with ease!
cons: It takes a few minuets to get used to their building interface. But once you get the hang of it you are good to go!

description: After I contacted support for an interview, I was told that I may want to hire someone that does app development from scratch to have the functions needed for my app.
author: Daryl A.
pros: Easy to use for basic app development, drag and drop style.
cons: Does not go beyond basic development or customization.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Even though am paying customer, in the tier where I cannot reach an individual to speak to. I get reply emails with same message "we are looking into it" and it has been several weeks. I am severely disappointed.
author: Amy Y.
pros: Features are easy to use, there is a learning curve but easy to overcome.
cons: All the information in my app disappeared and literally nobody has been able to give a competent reply as to what happened.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best App builder that saved me!
description: It will save a lot of your time and money. You have a direct say in how you want your app to be like that's the best thing I like about them
author: Akansha B.
pros: I was revolted when I knew that is building an app is not only learning about coding and the concept. I struggled so much to learn it and it was of no use. Then I came across Build Fire and I was so happy with it. It is user- friendly, you can make an app in just three steps and you get to use your customizing skills. Also, there is a part of the cost of devolving which they are very open about and the delivery was on time. I really am a happy app maker now, and soon going to launch my second app.
cons: It just takes time to get used to the editor, but then that's on your speed so that's not really on you. The app is pretty much perfect.

review_title: Great team, very helpful regarding the whole process, excellent app!
author: Milica M.
pros: I must say I was sceptical at the beginning but had the best experience. I really felt it was easy to get app and easy to work with. The background coding is no needed, so it was easy to work with. The maintenance and upkeep are minimum. Then there are a lot of templates that you can work with and customize it like you want, there is a wide range of things that you can do actually. I was very pleased with apps features.The good thing was, that there was a fraction of the costs for developing. So, they were very open about the pricing and it was delivered like we agreed. We had very smooth communication and they tried to help out. Though, I had a lot of questions and sending tons of mails. Eventually, I'm very satisfied how they managed the situations we had. I mean, I was open to try it out and it turned out good. Big thumbs up for everything!

description: BuildFire it's a platform that allows beginners in coding to fulfill their dreams, they make the app making process easy and fast, the quality of their work is excellent. Also, their customer supports it's great and attentive, whenever I needed help with the platform they were there to answer my questions to which they responded fast and clear. BuildFire it's definitely the company you are looking for if you lack the ability to code, their service is professional and serious, I will use their service again so I recommend it.
author: Kevin H.
pros: For coding beginners like me this platform is great, with them I was able to make the app of my dreams. Furthermore, their customer supports it's fast and attentive, whenever I needed help with the platform they were there to answer my questions to which they responded clearly and concisely.

review_title: Great platform for anyone wishing to develop mobile application, regardless of coding knowledge.
description: Quick development, reliable customer support and improved customization.
author: Remmington O.
pros: When a colleague recommended Buildfire for work, I doubted there could exist a platform where I could develop mobile applications with no knowledge of coding. While I am conversant with mobile application development, I was looking for something to help reduce the workload, and Buildfire was it! The platform offers a wide variety of templates with lots of customization options which help develop functional, aesthetic applications for my work projects. Not only does the Buildfire platform improve my productivity, but it also does so at a fraction of the cost I would pay other developers to create the applications.
cons: At first I found it challenging to navigate the dashboard, but the launch of the 3.0 dashboard made the platform significantly easier to use, at least for someone who has been using Buildfire for a while.

review_title: I have been searching for the best app builder until I found BuildFire
description: With the sophisticated features of BuildFire I easily built an app in couple of days.
author: RIDWAN O.
pros: The app gave me the chance to customize without coding background. I enjoy the good customer support offered BuildFire. Just a click and the support center are live with me. With the sophisticated features of BuildFire I easily built an app in couple of days.

review_title: Lack of Options, Lack of Support
author: Shane S.
pros: The Buildfire platform is super easy to use if you're just a run of the mill consumer who wants an easy app and you aren't picky about design, customization, or anything else. The pricing also isn't bad if that's all you're after
cons: If you want a true customizable experience where you can make an app really YOURS, this isn't the system. I battled their setup for several months trying to make something that was unique and eventually conceded that it wouldn't happen. Without a desire to pay for their custom design services, I was stuck in their boring, stock options with no flexibility. While working with them, I received an email saying my account had been disabled, but when I contacted them all they said was "oh, it's fine", even though nothing supported that statement. Very confusing, frustrating, etc. They also do not have a proper system to handle two factor authentication which is standard on most Apple accounts now. You have to schedule a call with a tech who is in Milan, not in the US, english is only "so/so", and you have to do this every single time you want to edit the app or push new versions live. Definitely not user friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: My favorite part is the fact that I don't know how to code and I was able to make an app I wanted. On top of that, they provides great customer support. When I needed help I just started a live message thread and someone replied right away to help me.
cons: Only thing is it takes a little time for me to get use to the editor. Overall of good platform..

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Good social networking features: BuildFire uses SmartPush technology, thanks to which you can quickly create multiple groups based on the business you are involved with and to the taste of your users. Users of your app can send comments, images and similar comments and SmartPush will always send notifications. You can also advertise events and sales for your business through this technology.
cons: There are not enough comments: it might not be the most significant scam, but since BuildFire is a company launched recently, there are few comments from users about it. This also means that there is a small community of support and difficulty in finding advice, a problem we encounter on several occasions.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I wanted to make an app, and having a lot of trouble in finding quality software. Until I found this
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy delivery is the best thing they have right now. You get exactly what you need. Low maintenance and upkeep, you don't have to worry about anything else when having this around. No coding background needed, like mine, you can just pick up your idea and turn it into reality.

review_title: Best app builder software. Excellent customer service
description: I succeeded in creating a nice app that suits my interest easily and published it in no time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: what I love most is that the app creation tools are easy to use. There is a lot template to work with and the fact that I can actually customize my templates takes this app to a whole new level. Couple with great customer service, without coding experience this app made me look like a pro.
cons: Sometimes it was difficult to figure out certain things in the app, I had a delay publishing my app because I didn't follow guidelines
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Worst company I have ever worked with
author: Rusty B.
pros: I like the price- until I realized what you got with the price.
cons: - Nonstop issues - changed plugin numerous times - the app simply has never worked or functioned properly since day 1 - customer service is horrible, no phone number to call, and takes days on average to them to respond - lots of staff turnover, never know who to contact

description: Easy to design apps of my own without any programming knowledge.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: BuildFire has some very neat customizable templates. It hardly needs any maintenance and the cost of development and design are very fair. It is simple to use and understand for anyone, even a non-professional as myself.
cons: Nothing seems off about it, but just for improvement the design might need an upgrade. It might be a good idea to add more templates.

review_title: Love the product! Especially after the 2.0 release
description: I'm a software develop who stopped developing public websites for a while and moved that over to WordPress so I focus on business logic. Finally I can do the same on mobile. The biggest game changer for me was the developer support to add custom plugins to bridge the feature gap.
author: Daniel M.
pros: Super simple to use Feature Rich Allows developers to develop on the platform
cons: Some hardware integrations are not there like NFC and iBeacon. However to be fair I'm assured they are coming soon

description: I found a way to burn over $1,000
author: Stephen V.
pros: The app builder worked so well in the initial build sections that I assumed unlocking the paid features was going to be a continuation of the same type of performance.
cons: It was only after subscribing to access the locked sections that I discovered that the app builder was not working. Their instructions were not congruent with the actual app builder and their subscription fees were not disclosed. They are willing to provide features as part of a package deal only if you call them out on false advertising.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Judy W.
pros: I was looking for a quality and professional mobile app for my business. Just when I was about to give up, a friend of mine referred me to BuildFire mobile app building platform. The way they deployed Cloud, SaaS, Ios Native, and Mobile Android Native was terrific. You also get to enjoy support and training through Webinars, Live Online, Documentation, and In Person. The app is easy to use and customize to my preference. Try it and experience service beyond expectation.
cons: It was hard for me to operate the editor. I was forced to Google to understand the editor features.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The app is easy to use and I was able to build a mobile app pretty quick for my course and published it in less than a week
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy delivery I don't need to coding background. Very easy and fast build up an app Great customer support

description: I used this app to build a travel app for my country. It’s great!
author: Marquis C.
pros: I liked the fact that the customer care is the most important.
cons: I’m still learning to code. I wish they had more information on how to make custom plugins.

author: Onome J.
pros: I needed an application for my blog, went on search and found buildfire. I was marvelled at the name but then gave it a shot. It wasn't all that bad, buldfire had beautiful features and the interface was cool. You can create your application with your smartphone if you do not have access to a laptop. I also loved the selection of icons. With buldfire you don't need coding skills
cons: Buldfire was somewhat confusing and it took me a while to come to terms with the functionality of the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Pierre M.
pros: We fell for their great sales pitch, now we are waiting for a refund for more than 2 years.
cons: They keep charging money even after having cancelled the subscription. Obviously, the sales [sensitive content hidden] was lying to us about terms & conditions, he confirmed via e-mail that we could cancel at any time. However, it turns out, that we are still charged more that thousand dollars. We are now in contact with [sensitive content hidden] who is simply telling us, that they have a zero refund policy. Stay away!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Experience! I like it most.
author: Elena D.
pros: The great opportunity is, No need to know Coding knowledge. It's very helpful for Beginners. I don't know Coding, but I would wish to build an App. BuildFire makes it true. It's easy to use. Amazing Customer Support through Live Messaging thread! Available templates Selection, theme and overall customization is really GOOD! Another great fact is that price of developing app is really very comfortable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I was able to build an app.
author: Cecelia S.
pros: No coding background needed: I had no coding background was able to use this software easily. Great customer support: Their customer support never failed me, they were able to provide every help i needed from the beginning till the end
cons: It takes time to get used to the editor: As a new user it took me time to learn the whole process, but i was able to make use of it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
